creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #1)
I tested changing this to QT 5 but when run, it produces this error:

RuntimeError: the sip module implements API v12.0 to v12.3 but the PyQt5.QtCore module requires API v12.4

So I think this isn't possible right now. Closing for now, I'll re-examine at a later time.
